zh.lifeSummary: 當Sarah Dyer於1649年3月10日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可維姆斯時，她的父親Thomas Dyer37歲，母親Agnes Reed33歲。她於1674年3月16日與John Ruggles Jr在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可洛波利結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1687年5月2日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓洛波利享年38歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓洛波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sarah Dyer于1649年3月10日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可維姆斯时，她的父亲Thomas Dyer37岁，母亲Agnes Reed33岁。她于1674年3月16日与John Ruggles Jr在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可洛波利结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1687年5月2日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓洛波利享年38岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓洛波利。

nameMeanings.name: Dyer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a dyer of cloth, from Middle English deier, degher ‘dyer’ (Old English dēag ‘dye’; the verb is a back-formation from the agent noun). Compare Dexter . The name is typical of southern England. In the Midlands Dexter is the more common equivalent and in northern England Lister .
Irish (Sligo and Antrim): variant of   Dwyer  .

variants.name: Dier
meanings: South German: from Middle High German dier ‘wild animal, game’; probably a metonymic occupational name for a hunter, or a topographic or habitational name referring to a house distinguished by a sign depicting such an animal.

variants.name: Dayer
meanings: English and Scottish: perhaps a variant of   Dyer  .

variants.name: Dyar
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Dyer  .

variants.name: Dexter
meanings: English (East Midlands): occupational name from Middle English dexter(e), dei(gh)ester, deyster ‘dyer’ (Old English deaʒestre, deʒ(e)stre). The word originally denoted a female dyer, but came to be used for dyers of both sexes. Compare Dyer .

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

en.lifeSummary: When Sarah Dyer was born on 10 March 1649, in Weymouth, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Thomas Dyer, was 37 and her mother, Agnes Reed, was 33. She married John Ruggles Jr on 16 March 1674, in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 2 May 1687, in Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 38, and was buried in Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sarah Dyer est née le 10 mars 1649, à Weymouth, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Thomas Dyer, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Agnes Reed, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé John Ruggles Jr le 16 mars 1674, à Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 2 mai 1687, à Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterrée à Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sarah Dyer am 10. März 1649 in Weymouth, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Dyer 37 und ihre Mutter Agnes Reed 33. Sie hat am 16. März 1674 in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America John Ruggles Jr geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 2. Mai 1687 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Dyer è nata il il 10 marzo 1649 nel Weymouth, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, Thomas Dyer, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Agnes Reed, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato John Ruggles Jr il 16 marzo 1674, nel Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 2 maggio 1687, nel Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolta a Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Sarah Dyerが1649年3月10日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクウエイモウスで生まれた時，父Thomas Dyerは37歳，母Agnes Reedは33歳であった。1674年3月16日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクロクスブリーでJohn Ruggles Jrと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1687年5月2日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクボストンロクスブリーで38歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクボストンロクスブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colon: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴
ko.lifeSummary: Sarah Dyer(이)가 1649년 3월 10일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 w이모우스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Dyer(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Reed(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1674년 3월 16일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 록스버이에서 John Ruggles Jr(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1687년 5월 2일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴 록스버이에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴 록스버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Dyer nasceu em 10 de março de 1649, em Weymouth, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Thomas Dyer, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Reed, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com John Ruggles Jr em 16 de março de 1674, em Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 2 de maio de 1687, em Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 38 anos, e foi sepultada em Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sarah Dyer родилась 10 марта 1649 г. в местности вимоут, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Thomas Dyer было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Reed, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Ruggles Jr 16 марта 1674 г. в местности роксбури, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 2 мая 1687 г. в местности роксбури, бостон, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 38 лет и была похоронена в местности роксбури, бостон, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sarah Dyer nació el 10 de marzo de 1649, en Weymouth, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Thomas Dyer, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Agnes Reed, tenía 33 años. Se casó con John Ruggles Jr el 16 de marzo de 1674, en Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 2 de mayo de 1687, en Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultada en Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
